goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'friday' and should 'arrive by 14:30'.
The train should depart from 'norwich' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'south' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on friday and should arrive by 14:30
The train should depart from norwich and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the south and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should be in the expensive price range
Make sure you get address and phone number
